betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Energy Cell stores 200,000 AE of power. It buffers energy for the network and smooths out supply spikes.

Place it on any cable in the network. It charges from the network and discharges when demand exceeds supply. Multiple cells increase total buffer capacity.

Craft with:
4× Certus Quartz Crystal + 4× Fluix Crystal + 1× Iron Block

Tip: Always have at least one Energy Cell on your network. It prevents brownouts during high-demand operations like crafting.
